examples.description: Example 1 — Time series: Pembrolizumab trial growth over the years

request.query: How many Pembrolizumab trials started each year since 2015?

visualization.title: Pembrolizumab Clinical Trials by Start Year (2015–2026)

citations.excerpt: A Phase 1b/2 Study of Pembrolizumab in Combination With Epacadostat in Subjects With Selected Cancers
Study of the Effects of Pembrolizumab in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors
Pembrolizumab Plus Axitinib for Advanced Renal Cell Carcinoma
A Phase 2 Study of Sitravatinib in Combination With PD-(L)1 Checkpoint Inhibitor Regimens in Patients With Advanced or Metastatic Urothelial Carcinoma

meta.query_interpretation: Count of clinical trials involving Pembrolizumab grouped by start year from 2015 onwards
assumptions: Only trials with a recorded start date are included

examples.description: Example 2 — Bar chart: Breast cancer trial phase distribution

request.query: What is the phase distribution of breast cancer trials?

visualization.title: Breast Cancer Clinical Trials by Phase

citations.excerpt: A Study of the Use of Text Message Reminders to Take Palbociclib
Ph II Study of Pembrolizumab & Eribulin in Patients With HR+/HER2- MBC Previously Treated With Anthracyclines & Taxanes
Study of F-627 in Women With Breast Cancer Receiving Myelotoxic Chemotherapy
Palbociclib in Combination With Fulvestrant or Letrozole in Patients With ER+, HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer

meta.query_interpretation: Distribution of breast cancer clinical trials across trial phases
assumptions: Trials without a declared phase are classified as NA

examples.description: Example 3 — Bar chart (ranking): Top sponsors for breast cancer trials

request.query: Which sponsors are running the most breast cancer trials?

visualization.title: Top Sponsors by Number of Breast Cancer Trials

citations.excerpt: Palbociclib in Combination With Fulvestrant or Letrozole in Patients With ER+, HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer
Ph II Study of Pembrolizumab & Eribulin in Patients With HR+/HER2- MBC Previously Treated With Anthracyclines & Taxanes
A Study of the Use of Text Message Reminders to Take Palbociclib
MRI Parenchymal Enhancement: A New Marker of Breast Cancer Risk
Study of F-627 in Women With Breast Cancer Receiving Myelotoxic Chemotherapy
Breast Cancer Pre-habilitation and Prospective Surveillance to Prevent, Detect, and Optimize Physical and Function
Evaluation of Hydroxychloroquine to Prevent CIPN

meta.query_interpretation: Top sponsors by number of breast cancer clinical trials, ranked descending

examples.description: Example 4 — Network graph: Drug-condition co-occurrence in breast cancer trials

request.query: Show me which drugs and conditions appear together in breast cancer trials

visualization.title: Drug-Condition Co-occurrence Network in Breast Cancer Trials

citations.excerpt: Evaluating and Monitoring Immune and Clinical Responses in Early-Stage Triple Negative Breast Cancer Undergoing Neoadjuvant Chemo-immunotherapy With Pembrolizumab
Ph II Study of Pembrolizumab & Eribulin in Patients With HR+/HER2- MBC Previously Treated With Anthracyclines & Taxanes
Palbociclib in Combination With Fulvestrant or Letrozole in Patients With ER+, HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer

meta.query_interpretation: Co-occurrence network of drugs and conditions within breast cancer clinical trials
assumptions: Conditions capped at 3 per trial to reduce noise
Graph pruned to top 50 nodes by degree centrality

examples.description: Example 5 — Grouped bar chart: Pembrolizumab Phase 2 vs Phase 3 trial status comparison

request.query: Compare the status of Phase 2 versus Phase 3 Pembrolizumab trials

visualization.title: Pembrolizumab Trial Status: Phase 2 vs Phase 3

citations.excerpt: Study of the Effects of Pembrolizumab in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors
A Phase 2 Study of Sitravatinib in Combination With PD-(L)1 Checkpoint Inhibitor Regimens

meta.query_interpretation: Comparison of trial status distribution between Phase 2 and Phase 3 Pembrolizumab trials
assumptions: Phase filter applied post-fetch (CT.gov v2 API has no filter.phase parameter)
